import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

excel_file = Path\("woffl_gui/data/jetpump_history.xlsx"\)
print\("=== EXCEL FILE STRUCTURE ==="\)
print\(f"File exists: {excel_file.exists\(\)}"\)

# Get sheet names
xls = pd.ExcelFile\(str\(excel_file\)\)
print\(f"\\nSheet names: {xls.sheet_names}"\)

# Read the first sheet
if xls.sheet_names:
    df = pd.read_excel\(excel_file, sheet_name=0\)
    print\(f"\\nDataFrame shape: {df.shape}"\)
    print\(f"\\nColumns: {list\(df.columns\)}"\)
    print\(f"\\nFirst few rows:"\)
    print\(df.head\(3\).to_string\(\)\)
    
    print\(f"\\nData types:"\)
    print\(df.dtypes\)
    
    print\(f"\\nNull counts:"\)
    print\(df.isnull\(\).sum\(\)\)
EOF)

print\(df.head\(\)\)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import os

jp_history_path = r"C:\\Users\\sc9864\\OneDrive - Hilcorp\\code\\woffl_gui\\woffl_gui\\data\\jetpump_history.xlsx"
# Convert to forward slashes for Python
jp_history_path = jp_history_path.replace\("\\\\", "/"\)

if os.path.exists\(jp_history_path\):
    df = pd.read_excel\(jp_history_path\)
    
    print\("=== JP History Excel File Structure ==="\)
    print\(f"\\nShape: {df.shape}"\)
    print\(f"\\nColumn Names \({len\(df.columns\)}\):"\)
    for i, col in enumerate\(df.columns\):
        print\(f"  {i+1}. '{col}'"\)
    
    print\(f"\\nData Types:"\)
    print\(df.dtypes\)
    
    print\(f"\\nFirst 5 rows:"\)
    print\(df.head\(\)\)
    
    print\(f"\\nUnique Wells: {df['Well Name'].nunique\(\) if 'Well Name' in df.columns else 'N/A'}"\)
    print\(f"\\nNon-null counts:"\)
    print\(df.isnull\(\).sum\(\)\)
else:
    print\(f"File not found: {jp_history_path}"\)
    print\(f"Checking alternate paths..."\)
    alt_path = "/c/Users/sc9864/OneDrive - Hilcorp/code/woffl_gui/woffl_gui/data/jetpump_history.xlsx"
    if os.path.exists\(alt_path\):
        print\(f"Found at: {alt_path}"\)
    else:
        print\(f"Not found at: {alt_path}"\)

EOF)
